prompt: Create a realistic vertical smartphone-style photo of a professional woman seated on an outdoor wooden bench, cropped from just below the nose to the upper thighs so the face is not visible. She wears a fitted black business suit with a tailored blazer and matching trousers, over a crisp white button-down blouse with an open collar and visible white buttons. Her long dark brown hair falls naturally over one shoulder with soft waves. The pose is casual but polished, one arm resting along the bench and the torso angled slightly toward the camera, creating a close-up fashion/lifestyle composition. The setting is an outdoor urban park or plaza with gray stone paving, a wooden slat bench with dark metal armrests, and a small strip of greenery in the background. Use natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic fabric texture, subtle wrinkles in the shirt and trousers, accurate anatomy, and a candid high-resolution photographic look. Keep the image elegant, professional, and non-glamour, with no visible text, logos, watermark, or extra people.
